The '''Sanhedrim Ship''' was the mode of transportation used by the warrior class of the [[Aing-Tii/Legends|Aing-Tii]] monks.<ref name="TKO" />

==Characteristics==
The [[Starship/Legends|ships]] were approximately 300 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] long and cylindrical in form, with a very organic look to them. No ship looked the same as any other of its class, possibly due to indeed being of organic growth or origin.<ref name="TKO" />

The vessels' exteriors were covered by the same markings that the [[Aing-Tii/Legends|Aing-Tii]] themselves applied to their [[exoskeleton]]s, as well as what would appear to be an apparently random array of engines and weaponry sprouting out of the ship. It had a crew of 150 with 66 [[Gunner/Legends|gunners]].<ref name="TKO" />

Though the battle tactics employed by the Aing-Tii frequently included ramming their targets, they had various external weapons installed, including [[energy web generator]]s and [[null-burst projector]]s. There were usually thirty of these energy web generators and six null-burst projectors on each Sanhedrim starship.<ref name="TKO" />

==Behind the scenes==
The [[Wikipedia:Sanhedrin|Sanhedrin]] was a council of judges in historical [[Wikipedia:Judaism|Judaism]].
